extraction_reasoning: The litigation table reports 24 criminal proceedings by the Company, which are excluded as filed by the Company; the Against Company row has Nil criminal proceedings, Nil statutory/regulatory proceedings, and one tax proceeding, while all Against Directors, Promoters, Key Managerial Personnel and Senior Management rows are Nil. The ROC show-cause matter and ₹1.60 million penalty are stated not to be outstanding, so they are not added to the outstanding regulatory count. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹12.65 million for the one direct-tax proceeding, with no quantified matters against subsidiaries or other group entities; this equals ₹1.265 crore using ₹10 million per crore. Contingent liabilities are stated, not summed, at ₹12.65 million as of June 30, 2025, equal to ₹1.265 crore. The only top-five concentration percentages shown concern retail sales from top five distributors/states, not company-wide customers; therefore customer concentration is not disclosed, and no company-wide top-five or top-ten customer percentage based on revenue from operations or total income is available.
